textByHash.3a30bbba6de2336abf2c5b1b033c1a37675ed3b8: I am Keli, you have heard of me then?
textByHash.bd93fdd0ff22d013e983b650da22b16575155890: That's very kind of you to say. Reputations are not easily earned. I have managed to succeed where many fail.
textByHash.f8b4b298b51aefb065e538f2d45a5f29fe98918d: Well you can think that all you like. I know those blackarm cowards dare not leave the city. Out here, I am toughest. You can tell them that! Now get out of my sight, before I call my guards.
textByHash.0daca49cc6e042398beec17e47a13c0913270b7d: There's always someone ready to spread rumours. I hear all sort of ridiculous things these days.
textByHash.a7155c6d821760513ab203f34200d92de511db1b: Well, I can tell you I have a valuable prisoner here in my cells. I can expect a high reward to be paid very soon for this guy. I can't tell you who he is, but he is a lot colder now.
textByHash.16de39ba931c40d249ac3a919a57323958b7e266: Yes, I did most of the work. We had to grab the Pr...
textByHash.61bc1f694ab9e8af4e3b27de60b6fe249ba8a146: Er, we had to grab him without his ten bodyguards noticing. It was a stroke of genius.
textByHash.6cf63475860766e12a611abb6799b35a0e67a428: They will pay, or we will cut his hair off and send it to them.
textByHash.e6895b06c8a7c28dc237ae21ca7f748ba17b4fc8: That's a good idea, I could use talented people like you. I may call on you if I need work doing.
textByHash.90b00d6280dd9c76255f22390f48b292e3c9eced: There is no way to release him. The only key to the door is on a chain around my neck and the locksmith who made the lock died suddenly when he had finished.
textByHash.c2c017b6a98acce564fa1b95e8ecdd89be6bfc50: There is not another key like this in the world.
textByHash.08046db00016198b45e39990d50f794b04006073: As you put it that way I am sure you can see it. You cannot steal the key, it is on a Runite chain.
textByHash.59e5190a46ac4ff5d093f13eb7292b4365f2bbb8: You are welcome, run along now, I am very busy.
textByHash.5d6a8a74b0dc6c8104645fe9f82afaa49598669d: It is the best way I know. Dead men tell no tales.
textByHash.604759dd3b0a2d09cef0ce69cb128dcfdc7858ca: You must be new to this land then. EVERYONE knows of Lady Keli and her prowess with the sword.
textByHash.7f2c0930273573247f1490c1527672ecefa68b01: I have used a sword since I was a small girl. I stabbed three people before I was 6 years old.
textByHash.c8a89601f7300bdfbdb94f9e868919368b476490: I need to do a lot of work, goodbye. When you get a little tougher, maybe I will give you a job.
textByHash.4c6072d9704a4f58fb8ef15b72610ef4e5da189c: Well, you know of me now. I will wring your neck if you do not show respect.
textByHash.c18816f46ab55ae9595023c5ad24f25021b2c9cf: You should, you really should. I am wealthy enough to place a bounty on your head. Or just remove your head myself. Now go, I am busy, too busy to fight a would-be hoodlum.
textByHash.0536d47a976720769ce645850535a1bcda745bc9: You tricked me, and tied me up, Guards kill this stranger!!
textByHash.00075050f92c3c77c2bdf94d8b366b7303e2f98a: Yes, I am Keli. You've heard of me then?
textByHash.1c45d729c2dc0bdacad2524cc61194d3825643e3: Well you can think that all you like! Those cowards dare not leave Varrock. Out here, I'm toughest. You can tell them that! Now get out of my sight, before I call my guards.
textByHash.39baa252f63175195c371fb0ef9fcb6dbbf0f5ae: Why do you want to know?
textByHash.069454d4302c153aa3912eb2d9b5a86d38df7db6: Join us? Interesting... I suppose you do look the type.
textByHash.e35d06f97abb03cc5e8b5b31e7ed54456d6edd12: You'll of course need to properly prove yourself before we let you join us. However, what I can tell you is that we currently have a very valuable prisoner. If all goes well, he will make us very rich.
textByHash.e5cb2b4a48b87038c9cf09e551f233b34e6780fb: To catch him? Oh yes. We had to grab him without his bodyguards noticing. It was a stroke of genius. Mostly my doing, of course.
textByHash.f7a80fee27491cf465dbae050fe4af06b9be5f1d: There is no way to release him. The only key to his cell is on a chain around my neck, and the locksmith who made it died very suddenly.
textByHash.d3ece9282c127fffac6314c56cc01942ecae85b7: There isn't another key like this in the world.
textByHash.a8d25b0415bbc7ed92d59f04a8c4050b175ad1bc: Well I suppose there's no harm in letting you see it. After all, you have no hope of stealing it.
textByHash.555a22c9b5ece38df7a9257f1031b26efda85812: Well... only for a moment then.
textByHash.202d225fedbd4ecdf7f10bc01794a6afc89501a9: You are welcome, but run along now. I will need some time to consider your request to join us.
textByHash.1b3753e33b0ec9cbc3e15792755f417165341192: I have used a sword since I was a girl. My first kill was before I was even six years old.
textByHash.a5f7b334c908571f47d75c3bb4be66deedbff516: Yes, I am very busy. Goodbye.
textByHash.cfee6728833ed9d85ed78bf29f1d25f990553679: You must be new around here then. Everyone knows of Lady Keli and her prowess with a sword.
textByHash.6aa78224d45b98deead4a731a9a3e53a0cad9d10: Well, you know of me now. You should also know that I will wring your neck if you don't show some respect.
textByHash.e91a06b4f9e65ae13e591771418ad80971990a3d: You should, you really should. I am wealthy enough to place a bounty on your head, or I could just remove your head myself. Luckily, I am too busy to deal with the likes of you, so clear off!
textByHash.9e98493db654cb6749eaf03e02397fe60c21f5c0: Oh, it's you. What do you want?
textByHash.7ad379873630215fbcb50d8b1fa77e12b9721c3a: Until you join us, I can say little. What I can tell you is that he is very valuable. If all goes well, he will make us very rich.
